experiment_title: Fe(OH)₃胶体的制备及丁达尔效应观察实验

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="Fe(OH)₃胶体的制备及丁达尔效应观察实验" goal="制备Fe(OH)₃胶体并通过红色激光笔照射，观察丁达尔效应与NaCl溶液的对比现象" difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="beaker_1" type="flask" capacity="100 mL" />
      <Component id="beaker_2" type="flask" capacity="100 mL" />
      <Component id="alcohol_lamp" type="heater" />
      <Component id="stand_1" type="stand" />
      <Component id="dropper_1" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="laser_pointer_red" type="laser_pointer" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="Distilled_Water" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="NaCl_Solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="FeCl3_Saturated_Solution" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Add vessel="beaker_1" reagent="H2O" volume="40 mL" id="step_0" />
      <Add vessel="beaker_2" reagent="NaCl" volume="40 mL" id="step_1" />
      <Attach vessel="beaker_1" support="stand_1" id="step_2" />
      <Heat vessel="beaker_1" tool="alcohol_lamp_1" id="step_3" />
      <Add vessel="beaker_1" reagent="FeCl3" volume="0.3 mL" tool="dropper_1" id="step_4" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_5" />
      <Heat vessel="beaker_1" tool="alcohol_lamp_1" id="step_6" />
      <Wait time="60s" id="step_7" />
      <Insert tool="laser_pointer_red" vessel="beaker_1" id="step_8" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_9" />
      <Insert tool="laser_pointer_red" vessel="beaker_2" id="step_10" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_11" />
      
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_12" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 准备对照组和反应组：分别向两个烧杯中加入蒸馏水和NaCl溶液。
组装反应装置并加热：将含蒸馏水的烧杯固定在铁架台上并加热。
滴加FeCl₃溶液并继续加热，等待Fe(OH)₃胶体生成。
用红色激光笔分别照射Fe(OH)₃胶体和NaCl溶液，观察丁达尔效应并对比。
